title: Serene Sky Overlay
description: A fabricskybox sky overlay of mountians and a lagoon.
body:
This resource pack contains a view of a colorful sky. With mountains in the background surrounding a blue lagoon, it provides a lovely scenery.

**This resource pack requires the mod FabricSkyBoxes. Without it, you will not be able to see it.**

If you want to see more like this join my discord: [https://discord.gg/YrSWPbWDUF](https://discord.gg/YrSWPbWDUF)
![Sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6016be1caaa25015836039c2facc651a6977fd7c_0.webp)
